package-description: This package contains a component that collects a live data stream into an in-memory CSV buffer and emails it as an attachment.
author: Declan Ross

6e56afe5-c2c9-49f1-9b71-1220e7d4add9.name: Email Export Attachment (Dataflow)
6e56afe5-c2c9-49f1-9b71-1220e7d4add9.description: Collects live data rows from PORT2 into an in-memory CSV buffer and sends them as an email attachment when PORT1 is triggered or a row threshold is reached.
